channel.title: Stockwik Blog
channel.description: Practical guides on inventory planning, forecasting, reordering, and purchasing for Shopify merchants.

item.title: Sales velocity: the number behind every good reorder decision
item.description: Sales velocity — how fast each product sells — drives every good reorder decision. How to measure it, why plain averages mislead, and how to put it to work.

item.title: Stocky is shutting down August 31, 2026: a migration checklist for Shopify merchants
item.description: Stocky shuts down August 31, 2026. What still works, what data you can (and can't) export, and a step-by-step plan to move your Shopify store off it.

item.title: How to export your Stocky data before the shutdown (and what you can't export)
item.description: What you can export from Stocky before the Aug 31, 2026 shutdown, what you can't (supplier data), and how to save everything that matters.

item.title: Best Stocky alternatives for Shopify (2026), honestly compared
item.description: An honest comparison of Stocky replacements for Shopify — including where each one fits, where ours doesn't, and how to choose before the Aug 31, 2026 shutdown.

item.title: How to calculate reorder points for your Shopify store (with a worked example)
item.description: The reorder point formula (daily sales × lead time + safety stock), a worked example, and how to automate it across every variant in your Shopify store.

item.title: Shopify inventory forecasting: a practical guide for small merchants
item.description: How to forecast inventory for a Shopify store — sales velocity, days of stock, seasonality, and turning forecasts into actual purchase orders.

item.title: Inventory planning for apparel brands on Shopify: size curves, variants, and reorders
item.description: Why apparel inventory is a variant problem — size curves, broken runs, case packs, long lead times — and how to plan reorders at the size/color level.
